testing_progress.highlight: glamsterdam-devnet-6 launched June 25 with Gloas fork; consolidation testing pending this week
Prysm nodes offline; potuz suspects EL-side bug (Nethermind invalid block, ethrex DB issue) rather than Prysm fault
Nethermind bug found via execution fixtures; fix in progress; Besu also offline
Erigon branch expected tomorrow; Reth branch exists but not yet joined; Grandine joining this week

eip_8282_builder_deposit_contract.highlight: Per-tx fee merged to sys-asm; bytecode now committed to repo for easy devnet genesis use
Nico proposes lowering builder deposit params: target=8, max=64 (from 32/256) to limit validator sweep DOS risk
Debate: dynamic params via calldata (PK's PR) vs. deploy new contract at next fork vs. keep constants fixed
potuz: no builder churn expected; deploying new contract at next fork is acceptable

fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: glamsterdam-devnet-7 scope: EIP-7688 (forward-compatible SSZ data structures) on CL side; no new EIPs on EL, only refinements
Open EL question for devnet-7: how to meter authorizations (EIP-8037 state growth + EIP-2780 transfer)
Target: finalize devnet-7 EL scope at this week's ACDE; CL scope at next week's ACDC

action_items.action: Felix to add disable-switch to EIP-8282 deposit contract (easy, low-risk future-proofing)

decisions.decision: EIP-8282 builder deposit contract: keep static constants (no dynamic params); choose values carefully; Felix adds disable-switch for future upgrades
glamsterdam-devnet-7 adds no new EIPs; EL scope limited to refinements of existing EIPs

targets.target: ACDE this week: finalize devnet-7 EL scope
ACDC next week: finalize devnet-7 CL scope
